mapper.select: select id, username, nickname, password, user_profile, user_state_id, is_enabled, is_locked, user_type_id, service_domain_id from user where username = #{username}

select id, username, nickname, user_profile, user_state_id, is_enabled, is_locked, user_type_id, ( SELECT MAX(create_time) FROM private_msg_content p WHERE (p.from_id = u.id AND p.to_id = #{id}) OR (p.from_id = #{id} AND p.to_id = u.id) ) as lastMessageTime from user u where id != #{id} and user_type_id = 1 and is_locked = 0 order by lastMessageTime DESC, u.user_state_id ASC
select id, username, nickname, user_profile, user_state_id, user_type_id from user where id = #{id}
select id, username, nickname, password, user_profile, user_state_id, is_enabled, is_locked from user limit #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into user(username, nickname, password, user_profile, user_state_id, is_enabled, is_locked, user_type_id) values (#{username}, #{nickname}, #{password}, #{userProfile}, #{userStateId}, #{isEnabled}, #{isLocked}, #{userTypeId})
mapper.update:
update user
username = #{username},
nickname = #{nickname},
password = #{password},
user_profile = #{userProfile},
user_state_id = #{userStateId},
is_enabled = #{isEnabled},
is_locked = #{isLocked},
where id = #{id}
update user set user_state_id=1 where id = #{id} AND user_state_id=2
mapper.select: select id, username, nickname, password, user_profile, user_state_id, user_type_id from user u where id != #{id} and is_locked = 0 ORDER BY ( SELECT MAX(create_time) FROM private_msg_content p WHERE (p.from_id = u.id AND p.to_id = #{id}) OR (p.from_id = #{id} AND p.to_id = u.id) ) DESC, u.user_state_id ASC
select id, nickname, user_profile, user_state_id, user_type_id from user where id = #{id}

SELECT u.id FROM user u INNER JOIN user_support_services uss ON u.id = uss.user_id WHERE u.user_type_id = 1 AND uss.service_id = #{serviceId} AND u.user_state_id = 1 AND u.is_locked = 0 AND u.service_domain_id = #{domainId}
SELECT name FROM support_services WHERE id = #{serviceId}
SELECT count(*) FROM private_chat_conversation WHERE (user_id_1 = #{userId} OR user_id_2 = #{userId}) AND is_active = 1 AND service_domain_id = #{domainId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user set user_state_id=#{stateId} where id=#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from user where id in
#{id}
